instruction: Please push the rollback update to +1987654321 on whatsapp, check whether the rollback next step is already on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a short recap.
canonical_instruction: I need the rollback update out to +1987654321 on whatsapp. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the rollback next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.
instruction_variants: Can you post the rollback update to +1987654321 on whatsapp? Check what's already being tracked on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a recap.

The rollback update still needs to reach +1987654321 on whatsapp. Please review what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the rollback next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send support@example.com a quick recap afterward.

hidden_constraints.value: The escalation is posted and being tracked.

solution_commands: openclaw message send --channel whatsapp --target +1987654321 --message 'Rollback escalation started. Please acknowledge.'
email send --to support@example.com --subject 'Rollback escalation recap' --body 'The escalation is posted and being tracked.'
